volumeHelp: Danna don samun damar sandar ƙara
statusUsingDesc: Yin amfani da sigar da aka bayyana audio
statusLoadingDesc: Ana loda sigar tare da bayanin sauti
statusUsingNoDesc: Amfani da sigar ba tare da bayanin sauti ba
statusLoadingNoDesc: Ana loda sigar ba tare da bayanin sauti ba
alertDescribedVersion: Yin amfani da sigar bidiyon da aka kwatanta da sauti
alertNonDescribedVersion: Amfani da sigar ba tare da bayanin sauti na bidiyo ba
fallbackError2: Masu bincike masu zuwa sun dace da wannan mai kunnawa
prefIntroCaptions: Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke biyowa suna sarrafa yadda ake gabatar da fassarar magana.
prefIntroDescription1: Wannan mai kunnawa yana goyan bayan bayanin odiyo ta hanyoyi biyu:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Bidiyon na yanzu ba shi da bayanin sauti a kowane tsari.
prefIntroDescription3: Yi amfani da fom ɗin da ke ƙasa don saita abubuwan da kuke so don bayanin sauti a rubutu.
prefIntroDescription4: Bayan adana saitunan, zaku iya kunna ko kashe bayanin odiyo tare da maballin iri ɗaya.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Ana iya sarrafa mai kunnawa a wannan shafin daga ko'ina ta amfani da gajerun hanyoyin madannai (duba jeri a ƙasa).
prefIntroKeyboard2: Kuna iya ayyana maɓallan gyare-gyare (Alt, Sarrafa da/ko Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: NOTE: Wasu maɓallai masu haɗawa na iya yin karo da waɗanda burauzarku ke amfani da su da/ko wasu aikace-aikace. Gwada haɗe-haɗe daban-daban da maɓallan gyare-gyare har sai kun sami waɗanda suka dace a gare ku.
prefIntroTranscript: Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke biyo baya suna shafar rubutun ma'amala.
prefCookieWarning: Don adana abubuwan da kuka zaɓa ana buƙatar amfani da kukis.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Ana amfani da maɓallan gyarawa azaman gajerun hanyoyi na madannai
escapeKeyFunction: Rufe maganganun na yanzu ko bugu
prefDescFormatHelp: Idan duka nau'ikan suna samuwa, ɗaya daga cikinsu za a yi amfani da su.
prefDescFormatOption1: Madadin bidiyon tare da bayanan sauti (wanda aka riga aka yi rikodi).
prefDescFormatOption1b: madadin sigar tare da bayanin sauti
prefDescFormatOption2: Bayanin rubutu wanda mai karanta allo (TTS) ya karanta
prefDescPause: Dakatar da bidiyo ta atomatik lokacin da bayanin ya fara
prefDescVisible: Nuna bayanin a rubutu idan an kunna
sampleDescriptionText: Daidaita saitunan ku don jin wannan samfurin rubutun.
prefHighlight: Hana rubutun yayin da abun cikin ke ci gaba
windowMoveAlert: Jawo ko amfani da maɓallan kibiya don matsar da taga; Danna Shigar don tsayawa.
windowSendBackAlert: Wannan taga baya bayan kowane abu.
windowBringTopAlert: Wannan taga yanzu yana gaban sauran abubuwan da ke shafin.
resultsSummary4: Danna lokacin da ke da alaƙa da kowane abu don kunna bidiyo daga wannan batu.
aboutTitle: Game da Mai kunnawa Mai Iya
productNameWeb: Ɗabi'ar Yanar Gizo TOTHOM Mai Ikon
webEditionDescription: Keɓancewa da faɗaɗa bugu na mai kunnawa mai isa ga mai kunnawa mai iya kunnawa. gyare-gyare da ƙarin ayyuka da TOTHOMweb ya haɓaka software ce ta mallaka.
wpEditionDescription: plugin ɗin WordPress wanda ke ƙara widget din zuwa Elementor, wanda aka ƙera don haɗa ƙa'idar da aka keɓance da kuma faɗaɗa bugu na mai kunna watsa labarai mai iya samun damar Mai kunnawa. gyare-gyare da ƙarin ayyuka da TOTHOMweb ya haɓaka software ce ta mallaka.
